questions.prompt: A company must solve the following requirement: match CPU, memory, and network characteristics to workload profiles. Which high-performing architecture design capability is the BEST fit? The primary focus is security.
questions.hint: Focus on the key requirement: match CPU, memory, and network characteristics to workload profiles.
questions.explanation: Right-sized compute family selection is correct because it improves performance efficiency and avoids resource bottlenecks.
questions.incorrect: The selected option does not best satisfy the stated requirement. Compare each option against the primary constraint in the prompt.

optionExplanations.A: Incorrect. DynamoDB partition key design is useful when you need to avoid hot partitions and support predictable high throughput, but it is not the best fit for this requirement.
optionExplanations.B: Incorrect. Caching with ElastiCache is useful when you need to reduce repeated database queries for frequently requested data, but it is not the best fit for this requirement.
optionExplanations.C: Correct. Right-sized compute family selection is the best choice because it improves performance efficiency and avoids resource bottlenecks.
optionExplanations.D: Incorrect. Read scaling with replicas is useful when you need to increase database read throughput without overloading the writer, but it is not the best fit for this requirement.

questions.prompt: A solutions architect is reviewing this need: accelerate content delivery for globally distributed users. Which option should be implemented first? The primary focus is resilience.
questions.hint: Focus on the key requirement: accelerate content delivery for globally distributed users.
questions.explanation: CloudFront edge delivery is correct because it lowers latency by serving content from nearby edge locations.
questions.incorrect: The selected option does not best satisfy the stated requirement. Compare each option against the primary constraint in the prompt.

optionExplanations.A: Incorrect. DynamoDB partition key design is useful when you need to avoid hot partitions and support predictable high throughput, but it is not the best fit for this requirement.
optionExplanations.B: Correct. CloudFront edge delivery is the best choice because it lowers latency by serving content from nearby edge locations.
optionExplanations.C: Incorrect. Placement and networking optimization is useful when you need to minimize latency for tightly coupled high-performance workloads, but it is not the best fit for this requirement.
optionExplanations.D: Incorrect. Read scaling with replicas is useful when you need to increase database read throughput without overloading the writer, but it is not the best fit for this requirement.

questions.prompt: During an architecture review, the primary requirement is: reduce repeated database queries for frequently requested data. Which AWS capability is most appropriate? The primary focus is performance.
questions.hint: Focus on the key requirement: reduce repeated database queries for frequently requested data.
questions.explanation: Caching with ElastiCache is correct because it improves response times by serving hot data from memory.
questions.incorrect: The selected option does not best satisfy the stated requirement. Compare each option against the primary constraint in the prompt.

optionExplanations.A: Incorrect. Placement and networking optimization is useful when you need to minimize latency for tightly coupled high-performance workloads, but it is not the best fit for this requirement.

optionExplanations.C: Incorrect. Read scaling with replicas is useful when you need to increase database read throughput without overloading the writer, but it is not the best fit for this requirement.
optionExplanations.D: Incorrect. Right-sized compute family selection is useful when you need to match CPU, memory, and network characteristics to workload profiles, but it is not the best fit for this requirement.

questions.hint: Focus on the key requirement: avoid hot partitions and support predictable high throughput.
questions.explanation: DynamoDB partition key design is correct because it distributes load evenly across storage partitions.
questions.incorrect: The selected option does not best satisfy the stated requirement. Compare each option against the primary constraint in the prompt.

questions.prompt: For AWS SAA-C03 preparation, choose the best solution for this scenario: increase database read throughput without overloading the writer. Which option matches best? The primary focus is security.

questions.explanation: Read scaling with replicas is correct because replicas offload read traffic from the primary instance.
questions.incorrect: The selected option does not best satisfy the stated requirement. Compare each option against the primary constraint in the prompt.
